## application-data/

The `application-data/` for Dungine is a little different than the standard `application-data/` folder, in that it all of the standard `application-data/` folders are located in `application-data/dungine/`.

This allows all Dungine-specific data to be exported as needed, without interfering with game data.

The `application-data/` folder contains:

| Folder name         | Folder description                                     |
|--------------------:|:-------------------------------------------------------|
|`dungine/`           | Dungine data                                           |
